main.rss_check: Step 1: Checking for new articles from RSS feeds...
main.no_pending: No pending articles (waiting for abstract) at the moment.
main.pending_count: Step 2: Attempting Gemini analysis for {count} pending articles...
main.limit_reached: Analysis success limit ({limit} articles) reached. Remaining will be processed next time.
main.tried_limit: Attempt limit ({limit} articles) reached. Ending access for today to protect Google Scholar.
main.scholar_no_resp:
CRITICAL: No response from Google Scholar (likely waiting for CAPTCHA)
Interrupting process for today for safety.
main.gemini_limit:
!!!! {error} !!!!
Gemini quota limit reached. Interrupting process for today.
main.gemini_unavailable_stop:
!!!! Gemini unavailable for 4 consecutive attempts !!!!
There might be a service outage on Gemini's side. Interrupting process for today.
main.not_registered: Not yet registered in Google Scholar: {title}
main.captcha_detected: CAPTCHA detected. Please solve it in the browser window.
main.invalid_title_warning: Warning: Title is missing. Skipping this article and marking it as completed (discarded).
main.gemini_unavailable_continue: Temporary error. Skipping analysis for this article until next run (saving fetched abstract).
main.gemini_not_found:
!!!! {error} !!!!
Gemini model not found. Please check your configuration. Interrupting analysis.
main.fallback_triggered: !!!! Switching model and retrying due to failure: {model} (Attempt {attempt}/{max}) !!!!

config_editor.title: Paper-checker Config Editor
config_editor.desc_fallback_model: Model ID to automatically switch to if primary fails (e.g., gemma-4-31b-it). Leave empty to disable fallback.
config_editor.desc_gemini: Maximum number of papers Gemini analyzes per run.
config_editor.desc_scholar: Maximum attempts to access Google Scholar per run.
config_editor.numeric_error: Please enter half-width numbers for numeric settings.
config_editor.key_empty_confirm: API key is empty. Are you sure you want to save?
config_editor.initial_setup_warning:
[IMPORTANT] Initial setup is required.
ronbun_checker will not run until you enter settings and click 'Save'.
(* Gemini API Key and other settings are required.)
config_editor.desc_scholar_years: Past years range to search on Google Scholar (1=within 1 year)
config_editor.desc_captcha_timeout: Maximum time to wait for manual CAPTCHA resolution.
config_editor.desc_playwright: If ON, automates browser to allow manual CAPTCHA resolution when detected.
config_editor.wait_on_exit: Wait for Enter key on exit:
config_editor.desc_wait_on_exit: If OFF, the window will close immediately after finishing.
config_editor.desc_random_max: Maximum random seconds to add to each request interval (0 to this value).
config_editor.desc_semantic_scholar_key: Semantic Scholar API key (optional). Setting this reduces accesses to Google Scholar.
config_editor.desc_semantic_scholar_interval: Interval between Semantic Scholar API requests (cannot be set below 1 second).
config_editor.desc_semantic_scholar_max: Maximum number of Semantic Scholar API calls per run.

gemini.output_instruction:
- "reason": A concise reason in English. If relevant, include which keyword it relates to.
   - "translated_abstract": An accurate English summary of the abstract (must be provided regardless of relevance).
gemini.error_retry: Gemini API Temporary Error (503 or Timeout)! Retrying in {wait}s... (Attempt {attempt}/{max})
gemini.error_fallback_immediate: Gemini API Temporary Error (503 or Timeout)! Switching to fallback model immediately... (Attempt {attempt}/{max})

prefetch.no_pending: No pending articles without abstracts at the moment.
prefetch.start: Step 1.5: Attempting to pre-fetch abstracts for {count} missing entries using Semantic Scholar...
prefetch.limit_reached: Semantic Scholar API request limit ({limit}) reached. Ending process for today.
prefetch.fallback: [Semantic Scholar] Not found (kept for Google Scholar fallback): {title}
